scripts.test: pnpm run test:mssql:configure && pnpm run test:mssql:decorator
scripts.test:mssql:offline: cross-env LUBEJS_TEST_DRIVER=mssql TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true mocha --require ts-node/register --extension ts --timeout 0 'tests/mssql/core/sql-ast*.test.ts'
scripts.test:mssql:configure: cross-env LUBEJS_TEST_KIND=configure LUBEJS_TEST_DRIVER=mssql TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true mocha --require ts-node/register --require ./bootstrap.js --extension ts --timeout 0 'tests/mssql/**/*.test.ts'
scripts.test:mssql:decorator: cross-env LUBEJS_TEST_KIND=decorator LUBEJS_TEST_DRIVER=mssql TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true mocha --require ts-node/register --require ./bootstrap.js --extension ts --timeout 0 'tests/mssql/**/*.test.ts'
scripts.test:mysql:offline: cross-env LUBEJS_TEST_DRIVER=mysql TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true mocha --require ts-node/register --extension ts --timeout 0 'tests/mysql/core/sql-ast*.test.ts'
scripts.test:mysql:configure: cross-env LUBEJS_TEST_KIND=configure LUBEJS_TEST_DRIVER=mysql TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true mocha --require ts-node/register --require ./bootstrap.js --extension ts --timeout 0 'tests/mysql/**/*.test.ts'
